title: Dependency Analysis
description: Analyzing dependency graph: why a package is required, what prohibits an upgrade, and outdated packages

actors.name: Developer
actors.role: Primary actor invoking CLI commands to inspect dependency relationships

use_cases.name: Find Why Package Is Installed
use_cases.description: Shows which installed packages require the given package. Traces dependency chain upward to root.

use_cases.name: Find Why Package Cannot Be Installed
use_cases.description: Shows which installed packages prevent the given package+version from being installed (conflict detection). Requires both package name and version constraint args.

use_cases.name: List Outdated Packages
use_cases.description: Proxy command: delegates to `composer show --latest [--outdated]`. Lists installed packages with available updates, color-coded by semver severity.

key_methods: doExecute(InputInterface, OutputInterface, bool $inverted=false): int — core logic
printTable(OutputInterface, array $results): void — flat table output
printTree(array $results, string $prefix, int $level): void — recursive tree output
writeTreeLine(string $line): void — writes with ANSI fallback

methods: execute(): int — builds ArrayInput args for 'show --latest', calls $this->getApplication()->run($input, $output)

doExecute_flow: 2. Build repos: RootPackageRepository + (locked ? locker.getLockedRepository : localRepo) + PlatformRepository
6. installedRepo.findPackage(needle, textConstraint) — if not found, search defaultRepos or create temp platform pkg
7. inverted=true: collect replaces from found packages into needles[]
8. Parse textConstraint via VersionParser if not '*'
10. Output: empty → writeError info; renderTree=true → initStyles + printTree; else → printTable
key_relationships: BaseDependencyCommand depends_on CompositeRepository + RepositoryFactory (fallback package lookup)
BaseDependencyCommand depends_on PackageInfo (URL for hyperlinks in output)

inverted_flag_semantics.inverted=false (depends/why): Find packages that DEPEND ON the needle — normal forward lookup
inverted_flag_semantics.inverted=true (prohibits/why-not): Find packages that CONFLICT WITH needle+constraint — reverse/conflict lookup; includes replaced package names in needles; return code swapped (0=found conflict, 1=no conflict)

output_modes: Table (default): printTable → rows of [package-name, version, link-type, target(constraint)] rendered via renderTable
Tree (--tree): printTree → recursive ASCII/Unicode tree with color-coded depth levels
important_notes: OutdatedCommand is a pure proxy — all filtering logic lives in ShowCommand
ProhibitsCommand requires TWO positional args (package + version constraint); DependsCommand requires only one
Both depends/prohibits support --locked to read from composer.lock instead of vendor/
Circular dependency detection in printTree: children===false signals abort with warning
Color-cycling uses 5 colors (green/yellow/cyan/magenta/blue) by depth level in tree mode
